rulings.Case Title: ROGERIO DE LOS SANTOS VS. TRANE US, INC FKA AMERICAN STANDARD, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Reds Plumbing Supply Co.S Notice For Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 14, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Red's Plumbing Supply Co.'s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court's own motion to August 20, 2014. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 14, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Ametek, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment or, in the alternative, summary adjudication is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/TLJ)
